headline: Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners Enters Into Agreement to Acquire Majority Stake in Nicollin Environnement
summary: NEW YORK, July 10, 2026--Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM), through investment funds managed by Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners (MSIP), its private infrastructure investment platform, today announced it has entered into exclusivity and committed to complete the acquisition of a majority stake in Nicollin Environnement (Nicollin or the Company), a family-owned French environmental platform focused on waste collection and sorting, urban street cleaning and water-related solutions.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners Enters Into Agreement to Acquire Majority Stake in Nicollin Environnement
content.summary: NEW YORK, July 10, 2026--Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM), through investment funds managed by Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners (MSIP), its private infrastructure investment platform, today announced it has entered into exclusivity and committed to complete the acquisition of a majority stake in Nicollin Environnement (Nicollin or the Company), a family-owned French environmental platform focused on waste collection and sorting, urban street cleaning and water-related solutions.
